title: PvP Tweaks
description: A mod that helps you in pvp and adds other usefull tweaks.
body:
**This pack adds tweaks to enhance your PvP experience and improve your quality of life.**

_(i) All images below were taken in vanilla Minecraft 1.21.10._
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

# 📥 Installation:
This pack was originally designed for Minecraft 1.21.10 but works flawlessly in versions 1.21.6 to 1.21.11.

NOTE: The "clear lava" feature will not work when sodium is installed on the client.

![Sodium resource pack error](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f15951a18664a66a8d05b0bd04e9f56ea055da2c.png)

# ✨ Features:
## Clear Lava:
Helps you see through lava (helpful for finding ancient debris 🤑)

![Clear lava image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ee2e2551ebcbba6700986573adbc331c0ddf223_0.webp)

## Low Shield:
Lowers the shield for better visibility 👀.

![Lower shield image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5006983be1e76b7eb48a9764a72444290d150ff.jpeg)

## Pumpkin Blur Remover:
Removes the annoying blur when wearing a carved pumpkin 🎃.

![Pumpkin blur remover image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0abb795abd59d3cf36886700fcd9ccdc0baabccb.jpeg)

## Powder Snow Marker:
The powder snow will now be more blue-ish to not make it noticeable but not ugly ❄️.

![Powder snow marker image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd680e299709067c2f837cb07c019f2b200181c8.jpeg)

## Fishing Hook Hider:
Tired of players using fishing hooks to annoy you? This feature removes the problem 🎣!

![Fishing hook hider image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8c9fa6b0b286275866391b7a24d514348311a7a.jpeg)

## Low Fire:
Reduces the fire overlay for better visibility 🔥.

![Low fire image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45c571da8f56e3db208d5378b62135e70e3d870e.jpeg)

## Visible Trapped Chest:
Trapped chests are now clearly marked, so you won’t get caught off guard 🚩!

![Visible trapped chest image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/677aea892899d8938e0d3d73328612c97606bc3f.jpeg)

## Clear Wither Hearts:
The wither effect no longer obscures your health, it’s now clear 💖!

![Clear wither hearts image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f88d211788abe20aa7e315b72903473e85c41ace.jpeg)

## Small Totem:
The totem's sized is reduced for better visibility 🗿.

![Small totem image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/449e6a77cc9eeeba7dd31c462f42618e205cc189.jpeg)

# 💘 Support:
To help me and make me get back to work making more mods, share and recommend this texture pack. Thank you !!!

You can also try my other mods on my [profile page :)](https://modrinth.com/user/Polr)
